messages.content: Travel request: I want an itinerary for London from 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-15 with high spending. Please respond with JSON only.
{"tool": "plan_trip", "arguments": {"destination": "London", "start_date": "2026-05-10", "end_date": "2026-05-15", "budget_level": "HIGH"}}
I need this handled. Put together a trip to Rome running 2026-09-05 to 2026-09-10; keep it low.
{"tool": "plan_trip", "arguments": {"destination": "Rome", "start_date": "2026-09-05", "end_date": "2026-09-10", "budget_level": "LOW"}}
Travel request: I want hotel results in Honolulu, arriving 2026-05-10 and leaving 2026-05-15.
{"tool": "search_hotels", "arguments": {"location": "Honolulu", "check_in_date": "2026-05-10", "check_out_date": "2026-05-15"}}
Travel request: I need a place to stay in New York for 2026-09-05 through 2026-09-10. Please respond with JSON only.
{"tool": "search_hotels", "arguments": {"location": "New York", "check_in_date": "2026-09-05", "check_out_date": "2026-09-10"}}
What should I expect weather-wise in Paris on 2026-08-21? Use the travel tool schema.
{"tool": "check_weather", "arguments": {"location": "Paris", "date": "2026-08-21"}}
